text: Added opaque subtype wrappers Symmetric, PositiveDefinite (refines Symmetric), LowerTriangular, UpperTriangular, and CanonicalSparse; cheap assume APIs and Either-returning verification. Focused JVM/JS tests green for zero allocation/subtyping, scale-aware symmetry, nonsymmetric Cholesky false-positive prevention, extreme common scaling, triangular tolerance, all sparse formats, and canonicalization invariance.
